overview: BiyoFlow is a water tanker delivery platform for Hargeisa, Somaliland. It connects households who need water with local tanker drivers through a USSD-inspired ordering flow and simulated ZAAD mobile payment. Customers order in simple numbered steps, drivers manage their availability and deliveries from a mobile-first dashboard, and the system matches orders zone-by-zone with full audit logging.
features: USSD-style customer ordering in 7 steps: zone, tank size, phone, address, payment, matching, tracking
Driver app with login, online/offline toggle, zone switching, price setting, and delivery status progression
Simulated ZAAD payment with configurable demo modes (always succeed, always fail, random)
Zone-based driver matching with race-condition protection and 15-minute expiry
Bilingual interface in English and Somali with persistent language preference
Full audit logging of all order events and state transitions
Demo reset function to restore seed data with 10 Hargeisa zones and realistic Somali drivers
